# HealthCare Physical Therapy

HealthCare Physical Therapy is a doctor-led clinic located in Walnut, CA, dedicated to providing high-quality, personalized care.

## Our Philosophy
We emphasize a 1-on-1 patient care model, ensuring that every patient receives undivided attention from their therapist throughout their recovery journey.

## Our Founder
The clinic is led by Dr. Gulrukh Saeed, DPT, who brings extensive clinical expertise and a strong academic background from Loma Linda University.

## Our Specialties
- Manual Therapy
- Sports Rehabilitation
- Post-Operative Care

## Core Information
- Founder: Dr. Gulrukh Saeed, DPT (Loma Linda University graduate).
- Address: 18856 Amar Rd #8, Walnut, CA 91789.
- Phone: (626) 667-8600.
- Model: One-on-one patient care focused on education and lasting relief.

## Primary Service Areas
We proudly serve the Walnut, CA community and surrounding areas, helping patients regain function, reduce pain, and improve their quality of life.
Walnut, Diamond Bar, West Covina, Rowland Heights, Pomona, City of Industry, Covina, and San Dimas.
